subcodes.first_line: O Javád! We have made mention of thee aforetime in divers Tablets, and We make mention of thee at this moment with a luminous remembrance, and We recall [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد ذکرناک من قبل فی الواح شتی و نذکرک فیهذا الحین بذکر مبین و نذکر من
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
